race.comment: SECRET ROSE (14) resumes here but has revved up for this with a dominant trial win and showed enough when last in work to warrant consideration in a race of this nature. Has placed two of four over this distance range and can run a big race while fresh. SUBPOENA COLADA (8) is facing the starter for the first time but has showed ability at the trials and is sure to be well-educated out of the Hoysted yard. Only needs some luck navigating from the sticky draw to be featuring in the finish. Former NSW galloper PRECISE STAR (3) is having his first run for the new stable but should find this easier than what he faced down south. Respect any market confidence. TORQUE SO HOT (1) will strip fitter second-up from the spell and looks to be improving with racing. In the mix. YATTAZOU (13) next in line out of the champion Waller yard.
